title: Pterygoid muscles
body_html:
Diagram illustrating the pterygoid muscles

Image sourced from Wikipedia

MuscleFunctionInnervationArterial supply
lateral pterygoid
  • Mouth opening (depression of the mandible)
  • Pulls head of mandibular condyle out of mandibular fossa
  • Protrudes mandible
  • Mastication (in conjunction with medial pterygoid)
Mandibular branch of trigeminal (CN V3)Maxillary artery
medial pterygoid
  • Mastication (in conjunction with lateral pterygoid)
  • Mandible elevation (close jaw)
Mandibular branch of trigeminal (CN V3)Maxillary artery

The RCEM syllabus advises detailed anatomy of insertions/origins is not required.
